sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_binomial (id UInt64, result UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_binomial (id, result) VALUES (1, randBinomial(10, 0.5));
UPDATE test_binomial SET result = randBinomial(20, 0.3) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, result, randBinomial(15, 0.65) AS random_result FROM test_binomial;
SELECT AVG(result) AS average_result FROM test_binomial WHERE result > randBinomial(12, 0.4);
